canonical_name: the woman she had been born to be
a priestess of the highest rank
a child she had not wanted
the daughter I owed to her shrine
a daughter to serve her in temple and grove
the deep and shadowed valleys lying between slate cliffs
the beloved and half-forgotten shoreline of Tintagel
the first child of a sworn priestess
An old midwife had told her that when a pregnant woman
the best of all the knights
a knight in Troy called Hector
